clips.title: Justin Thomas Challenged Us To A Golf Match!
clips.description:
Justin Thomas Challenged Us To A Golf Match!

Bob Does Sports is the comedy-golf crew (Bobby, Fat Perez & co.) known for big-personality scrambles, trick shots and on-course antics.

Clip from “Bob Does Sports” ▶ Full video on their channel.
